# MiddleLeap

> MiddleLeap is an independent advisory firm based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It helps banks, fintechs, financial infrastructure providers and regulated platform businesses move from strategic mandate to market execution.

Canonical website: https://middleleap.com/
Contact: contact@middleleap.com
Founded: 2021
Primary market: Middle East and North Africa

## Positioning

MiddleLeap helps leaders turn regulatory, commercial and technology shifts into platform advantage. Its work connects market position, platform economics, ecosystem design and AI-native operating models. Open Finance is a significant area of experience, but it is one part of the broader regulated platform transformation practice.

## Core capabilities

- Regulatory and market transformation: Open Finance strategy, regulatory readiness, LFI and TPP operating models, market entry and ecosystem participation.
- Platform and ecosystem strategy: platform propositions, API strategy, embedded finance, partnerships, commercial models and monetisation.
- AI-native operating models: value-stream redesign, agentic workflows, product and engineering models, governance and control.
- Transformation and execution: executive mobilisation, programme leadership, platform delivery, organization design and delivery modernisation.

## How MiddleLeap works

MiddleLeap works from mandate to working capability through five stages:

1. Frame the regulatory, commercial or operating mandate.
2. Design the proposition, ecosystem, platform and operating model.
3. Mobilise leaders, partners, product teams and governance stakeholders.
4. Deliver working products and capabilities.
5. Codify reusable knowledge, controls and agent workflows.

The Loom is MiddleLeap's reusable method for building regulated software with AI. A gated discovery harness finds the right problem; a governed delivery harness ships it under quality controls and human four-eyes approval. Both operate across always-on controls and the institution's governed context.

AI-DLC means "downloadable content for AI-enabled development." It is the public, installable marketplace that packages The Loom and related MiddleLeap domain intelligence as skills, agents and repository workflows. AI-DLC is an execution capability, not MiddleLeap's umbrella identity.

### The Loom

- Discovery runs through gates D1-D9, covering framing, evidence, scope, the no-solutioning boundary, synthesis, data governance, brand conformance, tangibility and stakeholder validation.
- Delivery is spec-first and agent-enabled, with bounded reviewers, quality gates, tripwire hooks and a merge policy in which agents propose and accountable humans approve.
- The context brain has three dimensions: regulated context, solution-domain knowledge and institutional DNA.
- The first evidenced implementation was the UAE Open Finance Back Office, where 134 of approximately 139 stories reached done under quality gates, synthetic-data constraints and human four-eyes merge.
- The current proof is demo-proven, not production-proven. It has not cleared live production scale or a regulator examination.

### AI-DLC catalogue

- The Loom: regulated discovery, delivery, continuous-assurance and harness-governance machinery.
- Open Finance: UAE standards, Islamic-banking context, risk review and value-proposition prototyping.
- AI-SDLC: repository context patterns and structured code review.
- MiddleLeap Brand: design tokens, components, assets, copy rules and a WCAG AA gate.

## Ventures and open infrastructure

MiddleLeap builds and contributes to working platforms so its advisory work is grounded in operating evidence. The portfolio has three distinct families:

- Open Finance Commons: independent, community-led infrastructure including OpenFinance-OS, Backoffice, the Data Sandbox and Ecosystem Watcher. MiddleLeap's role is contribution and stewardship, not institutional ownership.
- Platform ventures: focused propositions including Parqo and HiveMind, developed as working platform experiments.
- AI-native execution systems: The Loom regulated delivery method, Open Finance intelligence and the public AI-DLC marketplace.

The portfolio operates as a build, learn and apply loop: build working assets, capture market and execution intelligence, and apply the learning to client mandates.

## Engagement models

- Executive advisory for regulatory, platform and transformation mandates.
- Platform strategy sprints covering proposition, ecosystem, commercial model and execution roadmap.
- AI-native delivery pilots that adopt The Loom around one bounded outcome and leave a governed repository capability behind.

## Experience and delivery model

- More than 20 years of experience across banking, fintech, telecommunications and SaaS.
- Experience spanning Open Finance, Banking-as-a-Service, premium APIs, partner ecosystems and large-scale customer platforms.
- MiddleLeap assembles focused teams around each mandate, combining a senior lead advisor with specialists across regulation, strategy, product, technology, ecosystems and delivery.

## Primary source

- [MiddleLeap homepage](https://middleleap.com/): current positioning, capabilities, approach, experience and contact information.
- [MiddleLeap Ventures](https://middleleap.com/ventures): portfolio thesis, venture families, project status and external project links.
- [The Loom](https://middleleap.com/the-loom): regulated AI delivery method, discovery and delivery harnesses, context brain, continuous assurance, governance and stated limits.
- [AI-DLC](https://middleleap.com/ai-dlc): installable catalogue of MiddleLeap skills, agents, methods and repository workflows.
- [Open Finance Back Office build record](https://middleleap.com/ventures/backoffice): evidence-backed architecture, AI delivery harness, technology stack, quality system and development maturity.
- [HiveMind build record](https://middleleap.com/ventures/hivemind): the human-led Hive Coach product, runtime AI pipeline, delivery harness, quality system and development maturity.
- [Parqo build record](https://middleleap.com/ventures/parqo): the live acquisition wedge, approved marketplace design, AI-native delivery controls and next validation gates.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-17
